description: Store the latest clarification question so the next turn can answer it
name: pending_question

description: Whether the latest user turn hit a red flag path
name: risk_flag

description: Structured JSON-like summary for the latest detected red flag
name: red_flag_payload

description: Number of consecutive clarification turns in the current follow-up chain
name: followup_turn_count

description: Last resolved routing mode for the current turn
name: active_mode

description: Structured tag output for the latest normal user turn
name: latest_tag_payload

description: Structured HAM-D progress snapshot for mission mode
name: hamd_progress_state

description: Unified pre-summary state for future clinician draft generation
name: summary_draft_state

description: Clinician-facing draft summary generated from the unified summary state
name: clinician_summary_draft

description: Persisted manual routing mode override; auto means automatic routing
name: routing_mode_override

description: Short confirmation text for command-mode switches
name: command_feedback

description: Patient-facing review packet generated from clinician summary draft
name: patient_review_packet

description: Draft FHIR/TW Core delivery payload generated from reviewed summary state
name: fhir_delivery_draft

description: Retrieval governance snapshot for mission mode knowledge usage
name: mission_retrieval_audit

description: Retrieval governance snapshot for option mode knowledge usage
name: option_retrieval_audit

description: Structured burden and response-style state for cognitive load aware routing and replies
name: burden_level_state

description: Structured review and consent readiness state derived from the patient review packet
name: patient_authorization_state

description: Structured pre-delivery readiness state for FHIR and clinician export workflows
name: delivery_readiness_state
